latestHandover: Retrospective registration of adversarial auth security review. All 7 findings (ADV-01 through ADV-07) were identified and fully implemented in a single session. 3 critical security fixes (open redirect, silent empty key, iss claim check) applied to all 3 repos. 1 high (middleware next param) applied to all 3 repos. 3 medium quality fixes applied to preference-frontend and planner-frontend where applicable. TSC and Husky passed in all repos. Proceed directly to /finalise-global-audit.

sessionHistory.summary: Full adversarial review of server-first Supabase auth refactor. All 7 findings identified and implemented in a single session. Commits landed on audit/260319-cicd-workflow-health in all three target repos before this audit was formally registered.
